---
title: "Monica Reyes"
image: "foto.jpg"
links:
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "instagram", fill = "steelblue")` instagram'
    url: "https://www.instagram.com/mony_rey_1.0/"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "bluesky", fill = "steelblue")` bluesky'
    url: "https://bsky.app/profile/mreyesr.bsky.social"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "github", fill = "steelblue")` Github'
    url: "https://github.com/MonykRey"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE} 
library(fontawesome)
```

#### **Bio** 

Hello, I'm Mónica, I’m an undergraduate student in the Genomics Sciences program at UNAM. I’m really into computational sciences, especially focusing on microbial detection and the complexity of bacteria.

As for my hobbies, I love reading, mostly classic literature and romance novels. I also enjoy cooking and in my free time , I love rewatching series (my favorite comfort show is The Office).


#### **Education**

**Universidad Autonoma de Mexico** |  Juriquilla, Queretaro |
Undergraduate student | August 2024 - present 

<p align="right">
  <img src="image.jpg" width="250"/>
</p>
